title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) with the Laguna Water District (LWD) for the Temporary Use of a Portion of the Old Municipal Building to Utilize As Office Located at Barangay Baybayin, Los Baños, Laguna and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ,12/07/2021)
